Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Wooow! This place looks so different from how it usually does![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Yeah! Good job, Paulownia Mall! This is so exciting, let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Well, it's not every day we get a chance to see something like this, so I wanna take it all in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}It's kinda cold. Maybe we should stick close together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 4 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh, look! That looks pretty too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yuko and I walked around and looked[n]at the Christmas decorations.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}That was so nice. There were couples around everywhere, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}This is a little embarrassing, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I received the item (ITEM NAME).[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}It's supposed to work really well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}My grandma taught me how to make it a long time ago. The weather's a lot colder now, so be sure to take care of yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Christmastime is pretty magical, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Honestly, I didn't think much of it up until last year. It was just another yearly event to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}We'd have Christmas cake and chicken as a family, and then we'd exchange presents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}When I'd wake up and find the presents next to my pillow, I'd always shout, "Santa really came!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It was fun back then, sure, but this year, it's fun in a different way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}...Is it just me, or did it get hot all of a sudden? I wouldn't wanna sweat and catch a cold...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 -1 40 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Could I move closer to you... so I don't get too cold?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a tender moment with Yuko...[n]{f 1 1}
